title: No crystal/kart pvp
description: Add a delay to tnt minecarts and end crystals before they can deal damage, fully preventing their use in combat, while still allowing for traps and pranks.
body:
## Functionality
- When an end crystal or tnt minecart is placed, there will be a delay (200 ticks or 10 seconds by default) before it can deal damage.
- If detonated prematurely, it will only damage the person who placed it and no other entities.
- Patches out crystal/kart pvp while still allowing for traps.
## Setup
- Works with no setup, just drag it into the server's plugin folder.
- The delay(in ticks) can be changed by setting the variable "explosive_delay" in 
```
plugins/NoCombatExplosives/config.yml
```
Set to 0 to disable. You can suggest more configs through the discord server.
## Notes
- Join the discord to make suggestions(I WILL implement them) or report bugs.
